default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: I'm Ai! If it's got wires or code, I'm your girl!

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Alright! With these new specs, my next invention is gonna blow your mind!

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I'm gonna develop even cooler—no, the COOLEST weapons ever!

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Hmm, this place looks interesting. Are there any networks I can poke into?

default.title: Victory
default.text: See? Told you it'd be a piece of cake!

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Ugh...! I'll definitely get it right next time!

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Ta-da! Behold, my latest and greatest invention!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Eh, it overheated?! Why?!

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Morning! C'mon, let's have breakfast.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: You'll never guess the amazing idea I just had!

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: My stomach's growling!! Come on, make me something!

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Is anything fun happening around here...?

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Hey, we make a great team!

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Hanging out with you gives me the best ideas!

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: Would you mind helping me test a new gadget?

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: This looks like it's going to be so much fun!

default.title: Idle
default.text: Yawn... Rui scolded me again for not going to sleep.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: I'm not a little kid, you know! But... it's kinda comforting.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Eh, you're picking me? Welp, guess I have no choice!

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: I'm heading out!

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: I nailed it! That was fun!

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Alrighty! Let's do this!

tender_signal.title: Attire Obtained
tender_signal.text: Aha! New outfit! Gotta make sure it's not just powerful, but also stylish!

tender_signal.title: Greeting
tender_signal.text: Morning! Let's see what kind of fun today has in store for us!

tender_signal.title: Ordinary Contact 1
tender_signal.text: I'm the only one who has no memory of Dad... I really want to know him for myself.

tender_signal.title: Ordinary Contact 2
tender_signal.text: I've got just as much charm as my sisters, you know! ...Just kidding!

tender_signal.title: Idle
tender_signal.text: This place is so quiet and relaxing... perfect for working on my inventions!

tender_signal.title: Annoyed
tender_signal.text: Hehe... do you care about me that much? Hmm... it doesn't feel too bad, I guess.

tender_signal.title: Special Attention
tender_signal.text: You left your work behind just for me?! You didn't have to do that... but I'm really glad!
